goal: Investigate recent insider trading activity for SENS, compare it with subsequent stock-price movement, and produce a concise dated summary through the ai-company flow.
strategy: Prefetch public SEC and price evidence deterministically, then use a bounded Claude summary job so the child does not need to browse or recalculate from scratch.

jobs.title: Write final SENS insider summary
jobs.instruction: Write summary.md as concise markdown only. Use exactly 3 short bullet points and then 1 short takeaway sentence. Mention the dated 2026-03-13 and 2026-05-12 open-market-buy reactions, mention that 2026-07-01 compensation grants are not necessarily bullish signals, and state uncertainty clearly. Keep the total output under 120 words and do not add an intro or outro.
jobs.success_check: summary.md concisely summarizes recent insider activity and dated price reactions using the prefetched evidence context.
